{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48048", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-359", "name": "Exposure of Private Personal Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "### Impact
XWiki discovered that the patch for GHSA-5cf8-vrr8-8hjm was insufficient and with slightly modified parameters to the `LiveTableResults`, it is still possible to discover password hashes one bit at a time, so with 768 requests, the full password salt and hash can be retrieved of a user.

### Patches
The check for password (and email properties) has been adjusted in XWiki 18.0.0RC1, 17.10.13, 17.4.9 and 16.10.17.

### Workarounds
The [patch](https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/commit/c4442716b02ffcdaa9d5e703b1db6203e36456fa#diff-5a739e5865b1f1ad9d79b724791be51b0095a0170cc078911c940478b13b949a) can be applied manually to the wiki page `XWiki.LiveTableResultsMacros`.

### Resources
* https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XWIKI-23875
* https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/commit/c4442716b02ffcdaa9d5e703b1db6203e36456fa", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0004, "percentile": 0.12587}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rh28-mqj4-8x59", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-26T20:16:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rh28-mqj4-8x59", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rh28-mqj4-8x59"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48048"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-26T20:16:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/security/advisories/GHSA-rh28-mqj4-8x59", "https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/commit/c4442716b02ffcdaa9d5e703b1db6203e36456fa", "https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XWIKI-23875", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rh28-mqj4-8x59"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/xwiki/xwiki-platform/security-advisories/GHSA-rh28-mqj4-8x59", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform", "summary": "XWiki Platform's Livetable results still allow reconstructing password hashes using 768 requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-26T20:17:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rh28-mqj4-8x59", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "16.10.17", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-livetable-ui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.2.1, < 16.10.17"}, {"first_patched_version": "17.4.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-livetable-ui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 17.0.0-rc-1, < 17.4.9"}, {"first_patched_version": "17.10.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-livetable-ui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 17.5.0-rc-1, < 17.10.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: XWiki Platform's Livetable results still allow reconstructing password hashes using 768 requests
